stories.title: Wembanyama's Historic Playoff Debut — Spurs Roll Past Blazers in Game 1

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
35 POINTS. 5-for-6 from three. A franchise record in his FIRST playoff game.

Wemby didn't just show up — he ANNOUNCED himself. Tim Duncan's record is gone.

The Wembanyama era in San Antonio is officially here. 🏀

#HoopHeroes #Spurs

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Wemby dropped 21 points in the FIRST HALF of his playoff debut. League record since 1997.

First Spurs playoff without Popovich since 1999. New coach. New star. Same winning.

The era has changed. Everything else just has to catch up. #HoopHeroes #GoSpursGo

article.headline: Wembanyama's Historic Playoff Debut: 35 Points, Franchise Record, and a New Era in San Antonio

stories.title: Lakers Go Up 2-0 on Rockets — LeBron Leads Shorthanded Squad

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
LeBron James at 41. No Luka. No Reaves. Still 2-0.

28 pts / 8 reb / 7 ast in Game 2. Lakers hold Houston to 40.4% shooting.

KD came back with 23 points — still not enough. The King runs this city.

#HoopHeroes #LakeShow

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
The Lakers are two wins from Round 2 — WITHOUT their two best players.

Luka's hamstring. Reaves' oblique. Both out. Still 2-0.

LeBron James is doing WHAT HE DOES. Don't say we didn't warn you.

#HoopHeroes #LakeShow

article.headline: LeBron James Carries Shorthanded Lakers to 2-0 Lead Over Rockets

text_overlay: 28 PTS / 8 REB / 7 AST — GAME 2 WIN" in Bebas Neue white

stories.title: Magic Stun No. 1 Pistons — Banchero Leads Wire-to-Wire Upset

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
No. 8 seed. Wire-to-wire. NEVER trailed.

Orlando walked into Detroit and beat the No. 1 seed from tip to buzzer.
Banchero: 23/9/4. All 5 starters scored 16+.

The Pistons are in trouble. #HoopHeroes #MagicBasketball

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Detroit's home playoff losing streak: 11 STRAIGHT since 2008.

Tonight the Pistons get another chance vs Orlando. But the Magic led wire-to-wire in Game 1.

Can Cade Cunningham (39 pts!) get some help? Game 2 TONIGHT. #HoopHeroes #DetroitPistons

article.headline: Magic Stun No. 1 Pistons Wire-to-Wire: Banchero Leads Stunning Game 1 Upset

image_concepts.label: Image 3A

stories.title: Hawks Shock Knicks at MSG — CJ McCollum Drops 32 in 4Q Comeback

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Down 12 after 3 quarters. AT MADISON SQUARE GARDEN.

CJ McCollum didn't care. 32 points. 28-15 fourth quarter. Atlanta ties the series.

The Hawks just became everyone's favorite East story. #HoopHeroes #TrueToAtlanta

article.headline: CJ McCollum's 32-Point Fourth Quarter Fuels Hawks' Stunning Comeback at MSG

image_concepts.label: Image 4A
text_overlay: 32 PTS / 4Q COMEBACK / HAWKS TIE SERIES" in Bebas Neue white

stories.title: Round 1 Roundup — Cavs 2-0, 76ers Even Series, Thunder Roll

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
NBA Playoffs R1 update:
— Cavs lead Raptors 2-0
— 76ers even it 1-1 (Edgecombe 30 pts in Boston!)
— Thunder lead Suns 1-0 (119-84 blowout)
— Magic lead No. 1 Pistons 1-0

Thunder-Suns Game 2 TONIGHT 9:30 PM ET. #HoopHeroes
